title: Iowa
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Iowa

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in Iowa

You can apply for Medicaid in Iowa by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Iowa

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Iowa

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Iowa

CHIP in Iowa

Hawk-I covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Hawk-I in Iowa right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Hawk-I in Iowa.
